response.original_title: L.A. Murder Files: Haunted Hollywood After Dark
response.overview: Los Angeles promises dreams of fame and fortune, but for some the city becomes a gateway to hell and damnation. Beneath California's sun soaked facade, lies a darker reality filled with encounters that defy explanation. Through eyewitness accounts and chilling local lore, investigators uncover a hidden world of hauntings, apparitions, alien abductions, violent poltergeists and lingering souls trapped between the streets at night and the afterlife. Explore the truly haunted side of the City of Angels, where tragic deaths and violent histories have left restless spirits wandering the streets after dark.
response.tagline: Explore the truly haunted side of the City of Angels, where tragic deaths and violent histories have left restless spirits wandering the streets after dark.
response.title: L.A. Murder Files: Haunted Hollywood After Dark
